definition: Codebase-only headline for core-mobile: weighted blend of Appium spec→feature-folder breadth (token/stem/describe), required flow×wallet cells from required-scenarios.config.json (currently mnemonic-only until seedless E2E exists), and folder×wallet-slot assumption (wallet mode count from that config). Ledger is not automatable in Appium. TestRail is not part of this number.
